title: Formal Verification of the Golterman-Shamir No-Go Conditions and TPF Evasion in Lean 4
summary: Core formal verification claims are accurate: 55 theorems + 1 axiom across 3 modules, zero sorry, 14 Aristotle proofs across 4 runs. All Lean theorems exist and are sorry-free. The master synthesis theorem tpf_outside_gs_scope_main is a genuine five-part conjunction. However, the broader project counts in the Discussion/Conclusion are stale (429 should be 588 theorems, 30 should be 38 modules, 99 should be 233 Aristotle-proved), several paper-specific citations are missing from CITATION_REGISTRY, and one bibitem key has a year mismatch.

1_numerical_claims.notes: Paper 7 is a formal verification paper with no floating-point numerical claims. All 'numerical' claims are integer counts verified against source files.

checks.claim: 7 of 9 conditions encode genuine mathematical content
checks.source: GoltermanShamir.lean docstring: Substantive (7/9): C1, C2, C3, C4, C5, I2, I3

checks.computed_value: LatticeHamiltonian: 28 theorem decls + 1 lemma. GoltermanShamir: 14 theorem decls + 3 private lemmas + 1 instance. TPFEvasion: 12 theorem decls. Total theorem decls: 28+14+12=54. With instance counted: 55.
checks.notes: Count of 55 requires counting the unnamed Module.Finite instance as a theorem (reasonable since it proves fock_space_finite_dim). The 3 private helper lemmas in GoltermanShamir are NOT counted in the 55.

checks.computed_value: 14 theorem decls + 1 instance + 1 axiom = 15+1ax. 7 in ARISTOTLE_THEOREMS (3+3+1).
checks.notes: Inventory Index says 14+1ax (undercounts by 1 vs paper). Paper is correct if instance counted.

2_theorem_references.notes: All theorem references in the paper exist in the Lean source and are sorry-free. Zero sorry confirmed across all three files.

3_parameter_provenance.notes: Paper 7 references no experimental parameters from PARAMETER_PROVENANCE. It is a pure formal verification paper with no experimental quantities. The PAPER_DEPENDENCIES entry for paper7_chirality_formal correctly lists formulas: gs_condition_count, tpf_evasion_count, brillouin_zone_dimension, vector_like_spectrum_check -- all exist in formulas.py.

4_citation_integrity.notes: Multiple Paper 7 citations are missing from CITATION_REGISTRY. Also, bibitem key GoltermanShamir2024 has a year mismatch (arXiv 2603.xxxxx is a 2026 paper).

checks.notes: Bibitem key says 2024, paper entry says year 2026, arXiv is 2603.15985 (March 2026). Key should be GoltermanShamir2026 to match CITATION_REGISTRY.
Nielsen-Ninomiya no-go theorem Part I. Missing from CITATION_REGISTRY. Should be added.

5_qualitative_claims.notes: Core chirality-specific claims are accurate. Broader project count claims are stale and must be updated before submission.

checks.claim: First formal verification of the lattice chirality problem in a proof assistant
checks.location: abstract line 35, Sec V line 293, Conclusion line 320
checks.notes: Cannot verify 'first-ever' claims from codebase alone -- requires literature search. Plausible given the niche topic. No known prior Lean/Coq/Isabelle formalization of lattice chirality no-go conditions exists in public Mathlib or similar repositories as of the model's training data.

checks.claim: First-ever definitions of pivotal, spherical, and fusion categories in a proof assistant
checks.notes: PivotalCategory, SphericalCategory, FusionCategoryData all exist in the Lean source. 'First-ever' claim requires literature verification. As of early 2025, these were not in Mathlib.

STALE. Actual count: 588 theorems + 2 axioms across 38 modules (from inventory index and grep). The paper was written when the project had fewer modules. Must update to current values or pin to a specific phase snapshot.
STALE. Actual count: 233 Aristotle-proved across 30+ runs (from ARISTOTLE_PROVED_COUNT in constants.py). Must update.

checks.claim: Phase 5 adds 213 theorems across 13 modules, bringing total to 429
checks.notes: STALE. These counts reflect an earlier project state. Current Phase 5+ has significantly more theorems and modules.

checks.claim: Master synthesis is a machine-checked five-part conjunction
checks.notes: tpf_outside_gs_scope_main IS a five-part conjunction, but the five parts are: (1) I3 violated, (2) Z infinite, (3) C1 violated, (4) extra-dim (4+1=5), (5) nogo fails (9-3<9). This is 3 violations + 1 supporting fact + 1 consequence -- not 5 distinct violations as the paper's prose somewhat implies. The paper's abstract says 'five of the nine conditions' are violated, which is correct about the paper's overall analysis, but the master theorem only encodes 3 of those 5 violations (I3, C1, extra-dim). C2 violation (tpf_violates_C2, tpf_bosonic_exceeds_fock) and C3 conditional violation (tpf_c3_conditional) are proved as separate theorems, not in the master conjunction.

checks.claim: GS no-go and TPF operate in genuinely different mathematical frameworks
checks.notes: Well-supported by the formal analysis: TPF violates GS hypotheses (I3, C2, C1, extra-dim), so neither proves nor disproves the other.

checks.claim: Drinfeld double D(G) and gauge emergence theorem Z(Vec_G) = Rep(D(G))
checks.notes: DrinfeldDouble.lean and GaugeEmergence.lean exist with relevant theorems.

Paper shows pseudocode with simplified names (violation_I3, violation_Z_infinite, violation_C1, extra_dim, nogo_fails_with_violations). Actual Lean uses expanded type expressions. The name nogo_fails_with_violations does not exist -- actual conjunct is 9-3<9 which corresponds to nogo_fails_with_three_violations. Pseudocode is a reasonable simplification but not verbatim.

fig54_lean_theorem_summary.notes: Caption claims 429 total theorems and 213 Phase 5 theorems -- both stale.

issues.description: Broader project counts in Discussion and Conclusion are stale: paper says 429 theorems + 2 axioms across 30 modules, actual is 588 + 2 across 38. Paper says 99 Aristotle-proved across 27 runs, actual is 233 across 30+. Must update before submission.
5 Paper 7 citations missing from CITATION_REGISTRY: Nielsen1981a, Nielsen1981b, TPF2024, Tong2022, Aristotle. These should be added for provenance dashboard tracking.
Bibitem key GoltermanShamir2024 has wrong year -- paper entry says 2026, arXiv is 2603.15985 (March 2026). Key should be GoltermanShamir2026 to match CITATION_REGISTRY and actual publication year.
Inventory Index says GoltermanShamir has 14+1ax theorems, but paper says 15+1ax. Paper is correct (14 theorem decls + 1 unnamed instance = 15). Inventory Index undercounts by 1.

Paper prose implies the master synthesis assembles '5 violations' but tpf_outside_gs_scope_main actually encodes 3 violations (I3, C1, extra-dim) + 1 supporting fact (Z infinite) + 1 consequence (nogo fails). C2 and C3 violations are separate theorems not in the conjunction.
Paper listing uses nogo_fails_with_violations but no theorem of that exact name exists. Closest: nogo_fails_with_three_violations. The pseudocode is a simplification, not verbatim Lean.

notes: The paper's core claims about the chirality formalization (55 theorems, 1 axiom, zero sorry, 14 Aristotle proofs, 4 runs, master synthesis theorem) are all verified and accurate. The blocking issue is the stale broader project counts in Discussion/Conclusion which must be updated to current values (588 theorems, 38 modules, 233 Aristotle-proved) before submission.
